title: phaseoloides cinereum
intro: Phaseoloides cinereum is a plant species in the legume family, commonly known as a type of sensitive plant due to its ability to fold its leaves when touched. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Phaseoloides cinereum are thought to include the reduction of inflammation and oxidative stress, potentially aiding in the management of various conditions such as arthritis and diabetes. Herbal preparations of the plant, including infusions and tinctures, have been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
